case_title: FAY OY WONG VS. THE CALIFORNIA ASSOCIATION FOR HEALTH EDUCATION

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WONG, FAY OY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT THE CALIFORNIA ASSOCIATION FOR HEALTH EDUCATION EMPLOYMENT AND DIGNITY, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DBA CAHEED INFANT DAYCARE $6,289.55 PRINCIPAL, $75.39 INTEREST, $135.30 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,500.24, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
